blended.narrative: Granite Peak is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 929 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
